name: Jam Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, butter, buttermilk mixture (soda and water), blackberry jam, flour, cinnamon, and allspice.
2. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
3. Pour batter into 3 greased and floured cake pans.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit until done.
Icing:
1. Cook the icing ingredients until it forms a soft ball when placed in cold water.
2. Beat the icing until thick.
